ancestryParagon.name: Ancestry Paragon
ancestryParagon.hint: Adds an additional ancestry feat at first level and every odd level where one isn't already given.
ancestryParagon.label: Ancestry Paragon Feats

skillParagon.name: Skill Paragon
skillParagon.hint: Adds an additional Skill Feat slot for a special feat that grants additional feats based on what skill the feat is for.
skillParagon.label: Skill Paragon Feats

magaambyaBenefits.name: Magaambya Branch Benefits
magaambyaBenefits.hint: Adds an additional feat slot for each level for Magaambyan Branch Benefit Feats.

custom.name: Custom Feat Section
custom.hint: Adds an additional Feat section with one entry at each level.

customName.name: Custom Feat Section Header
customName.hint: The name of the custom feat section displayed on the sheet.

config.title: Configure Custom Feat Sections
config.instructions: Press the Save & Close button below for any changes made here to take effect; they'll show up on sheets immediately. Closing the window without pressing Save will revert all changes.

gameSettings.instructions: Configure additional feat sections to display on the feats tab of PC sheets. Choose what type of feats can go in each section, and what levels you get them at.
